name: widget_rename_preserves_binding
description: List-only binding-preservation fixture. A pre-staged Widget Blueprint must contain BoundButton with an OnClicked binding; after rename, widget_dump_tree with graph nodes must still show the bound event.
expectationNote: The fixture runner cannot construct arbitrary UMG delegate bindings. C++ automation covers binding object-name preservation; this contract records the required editor smoke sequence.

expectedContract.precondition: Create /Game/__UEvolveMcpTest/Widget/WBP_BindingSmoke with widget BoundButton and an OnClicked binding.
expectedContract.postcheck: Call unreal.widget_dump_tree with includeGraphNodes=true and verify the bound event still references RenamedButton.
